product: Budget policy support for Lakebase database instances and synced tables…
tagline: You can now tag a database instance and a synced table with a budget policy to attribute billing usage to specific policies.
what_it_does: You can now tag a database instance and a synced table with a budget policy to attribute billing usage to specific policies. Additionally, custom tags can be added to a database instance for more granular attribution of compute usage to teams, projects, or cost centers. This article explains how to use tags to attribute compute usage to specific workspaces, teams, projects, or users to support cost tracking and budgeting.
why_it_matters: Additionally, custom tags can be added to a database instance for more granular attribution of compute usage to teams, projects, or cost centers.
